title: Neow's Bones
description: Upon pickup, gain 2 random Neow Relics. Add 1 random Curse to your Deck.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: This relic triggers its effect during the reward choice phase after obtaining it. The granted relics are pulled from Neow's available reward options and won't include another Neow's Bones. The curses are selected from the unlocked curse pool without duplication.
